sourcePrompt: An AK-47, the iconic rifle of the NVA and Viet Cong, just under a meter long and lying level. A rugged rifle with a deep banana magazine curving down from the middle, a warm reddish-brown wood handguard, pistol grip and buttstock, a gas tube riding above the barrel, a front sight post, and a slanted muzzle cut. Blued steel and weathered wood, purposeful and battle-worn.
handEdit: mag rebuilt smooth: 3 chord-matched POSITIVE-angle segments (5/15/25deg) with 0.064-height burial overlap over 0.050 chords (old negative angles fought the forward march = sawtooth); stock leveled 5.2->2deg and raised to meet the mount line
